title: Flood-damaged warehouse in Juba
description: Heavy flooding has damaged roofing and floors. Some pallets of nutrition supplements are wet. Access roads are partially cut off.
key_challenges: ['Damaged stock', 'Risk of contamination', 'Delayed distribution', 'Documentation of losses']

title: Access-blocked warehouse in Sana'a
description: Movement restrictions prevent regular stock counts and distributions for 45 days. Some items are nearing expiry.
key_challenges: ['Access delays', 'Expiry risk', 'Donor reporting pressure', 'No recent physical verification']

title: High-turnover nutrition store in Tigray
description: Rapid distribution of RUTF/RUSF due to SAM surge. Stock cards not updated in last 3 weeks.
key_challenges: ['Poor record-keeping', 'Potential stock discrepancies', 'High consumption rate', 'Audit upcoming']

title: Cold-chain medical store in Kabul
description: Generator failed for 36 hours during heatwave. Vaccines and insulin at risk.
key_challenges: ['Temperature excursion', 'Product efficacy loss', 'Donor compliance issue', 'Replacement procurement delay']

title: Rohingya camp NFI warehouse
description: High demand for tarps and blankets during monsoon. FIFO not consistently applied.
key_challenges: ['FIFO violation risk', 'Overstock of older items', 'Distribution equity', 'Crowded storage']
